findings.summary: uncaught writeManifest throw (EACCES etc.) aborted the whole broadcast and discarded already-delivered results — now a per-target 'manifest heal failed' refusal; probe-verified at head (no throw, both results visible, no manifest left on the failed target)
heal-then-failed-write dropped the healed flag (silent manifest stamp) — healed now rides failure results; probe-verified (EISDIR case reports healed:true)
wire-less refusal reason named manifest.json while the decisive absence is entries.jsonl, nudging operators toward a forbidden hand-written manifest — reason now names entries.jsonl
